name: social-autoposter
description: Draft, review, approve, and autopilot X/Twitter posts. Thin desktop client over the social-autoposter pipeline.
long_description:
A guided assistant that drafts, reviews, and autopilots X/Twitter posts.
To get started:
1. Fully quit and restart Claude (quit and reopen, not just close the window).
2. Choose **Set up social-autoposter** from the prompt menu or type **Set me up on social-autoposter end to end**. The agent installs the owned runtime, connects X, discovers and configures your product, and verifies with a draft-only cycle.

tools.name: setup
tools.description: Run first and continue end to end: inspect status, connect X, discover and configure the product, seed topics, and proceed to draft-only verification.

tools.name: install_runtime
tools.description: Install or repair the owned Python, Chromium, Chrome, and browser-harness runtime. Safe and idempotent.

tools.name: install_status
tools.description: Poll the owned runtime installation until it is ready or returns a concrete failure.

tools.name: draft_cycle
tools.description: Scan X, draft replies locally, walk through each one (approve or skip), post only the approved ones.

tools.name: autopilot
tools.description: Enable or disable background X/Twitter posting (the launchd cycle).

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Read-only post and engagement stats for the X/Twitter rail over the last N days.

tools.name: dashboard
tools.description: Render the visual dashboard (MCP Apps UI): project setup, X connection, autopilot state, and 7-day stats, with buttons to run a draft cycle, toggle autopilot, connect X, and refresh. Also rendered automatically after state-changing actions.
